projects_v2.name: public
projects_v2.description: Whether the project is visible to anyone with access to the owner.

projects_v2.name: closed_at
projects_v2.description: The time when the project was closed.

projects_v2.name: created_at
projects_v2.description: The time when the project was created.

projects_v2.name: updated_at
projects_v2.description: The time when the project was last updated.

projects_v2.name: deleted_at
projects_v2.description: The time when the project was deleted.

projects_v2.name: latest_status_update
projects_v2.description: An status update belonging to a project

childParamsGroups.name: id
childParamsGroups.description: The unique identifier of the status update.

childParamsGroups.name: node_id
childParamsGroups.description: The node ID of the status update.

childParamsGroups.name: project_node_id
childParamsGroups.description: The node ID of the project that this status update belongs to.

childParamsGroups.name: creator
childParamsGroups.description: A GitHub user.

childParamsGroups.name: created_at
childParamsGroups.description: The time when the status update was created.

childParamsGroups.name: updated_at
childParamsGroups.description: The time when the status update was last updated.

childParamsGroups.name: status
childParamsGroups.description: The current status.

childParamsGroups.name: start_date
childParamsGroups.description: The start date of the period covered by the update.

childParamsGroups.name: target_date
childParamsGroups.description: The target date associated with the update.

childParamsGroups.name: body
childParamsGroups.description: Body of the status update
